description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:7.1 Docker image and defines a before_script that (1) downloads and runs the Composer installer via curl | php, (2) fetches the Node.js 6 setup script with curl and executes it, (3) updates apt and installs zlib1g-dev, git, and nodejs, (4) installs the PHP zip extension with docker-php-ext-install zip, (5) runs php composer.phar install, and (6) installs Gulp globally and runs npm install. Cache the node_modules/ and vendor/ directories. Add a pages job that runs npm run deploy, moves the generated build_production/ directory to public/, publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch only.
